$comment: Cross-portfolio roadmap of ideas — skills, agents, routines, features, plugins, anything. The release pipeline ships dist-pcplugins/roadmap.json as a release asset; every paperclip instance pointed at this repo fetches it and renders a /roadmap page. Plugin entries from coming-soon.json are auto-injected as roadmap items (type=plugin, status=planned), and built plugins are auto-injected as type=plugin/status=shipped — don't list those here, just curate the rest. Field cheatsheet: id (kebab-case, unique across the roadmap), type (skill|agent|routine|feature|plugin|other), title (short), description (1-2 sentences), status (idea|planned|in-progress|shipped|wont-do), addedAt (YYYY-MM-DD), optional linkedPluginId (cross-link to a plugin in the Plugin Manager), optional notes (markdown).

items.title: Personal Weekly Briefing
items.description: Sunday-evening Chief of Staff briefing covering goals check-in, upcoming family dates, household items, health follow-ups, and the approval queue. Mirrors the CEO morning briefing but for personal life.

items.title: Personal Goals Check-in
items.description: Weekly Chief of Staff review of stated personal goals — surfaces drift as a structured check-in, not a nag.

items.title: Home Maintenance Scheduler
items.description: Seasonal home-maintenance checklist tied to time of year. Surfaces items (HVAC filter, gutters, etc.) before they become urgent.

items.title: Vendor Coordination
items.description: Follow up with household vendors via phone-tools — request callbacks, chase outstanding quotes, confirm appointment times.

items.title: Bill Reminder
items.description: Scans email for upcoming bills, subscriptions, and renewals; surfaces them in the personal approval queue before the due date.

items.title: Contract Expiry Tracker
items.description: Weekly email and document scan for contracts expiring in the next 90 days across personal and business contexts.

items.title: Portfolio Health Check
items.description: Monday-morning cross-company rollup of key metrics, flagged agent issues, budget consumption, and pending approvals — delivered as a single Chairman briefing.

items.title: Churn Risk Alerter
items.description: Combines RevenueCat subscriber data with Help Scout conversation signals to surface at-risk subscribers before they cancel.

items.title: CTO Sprint Review
items.description: Weekly CTO Agent skill: pull merged GitHub PRs, Rollbar error trends, and open bugs — formatted as a sprint review.

items.title: Social Content Calendar
items.description: Friday CMO Agent skill: plan and schedule the coming week's social posts using social-poster.

items.title: Lead Re-engagement
items.description: Email sequence skill for warming cold leads via email-tools with a configurable cadence.

items.title: Quote Follow-up Tracker
items.description: Tracks outstanding quotes and auto-triggers a phone-tools follow-up call after N days of no response.

items.title: Phone Collections Call
items.description: AI outbound call for overdue invoices — polite first-touch before escalating. Uses phone-tools.

items.title: Personal Travel Planner
items.description: Chief of Staff skill: takes a destination and dates, produces a structured itinerary with a logistics checklist, and queues it for approval before booking.

items.title: Household Manager Agent
items.description: Owns the household: vendor log, appliance warranties, maintenance calendar, smart-home status. Reports to Chief of Staff and frees them from household minutiae.

items.title: Travel Agent
items.description: Personal travel planning: flights, hotels, loyalty points, itineraries. Reports to Chief of Staff.

items.title: Personal Finance Agent
items.description: Household budget, personal accounts, anomaly alerting. Strictly personal side, zero business crossover. Reports to Chief of Staff.

items.title: Health & Wellness Agent
items.description: Appointment calendar, prescription renewals, provider contacts, health-goal tracking. Reports to Chief of Staff.

items.title: Sales Agent (per company)
items.description: Per-company role managing inbound lead pipeline, qualification, and follow-up cadences via phone-tools and email-tools. Reports to COO or CEO depending on the company.

items.title: Customer Success Agent
items.description: Proactive customer check-ins, churn prevention, and expansion-revenue identification using Help Scout + phone-tools + RevenueCat. Reports to COO.

items.title: HR / People Ops Agent
items.description: Portfolio-wide hiring workflows, onboarding/offboarding, contractor agreements, and performance-review scheduling. Reports to COO.

items.title: Legal & Compliance Agent
items.description: Portfolio-wide contract tracking, regulatory filing deadlines, and entity maintenance calendar. Reports to CEO / Chairman.

items.title: IT / Infrastructure Agent
items.description: Owns server uptime, SSL cert expiry, backup status, and Paperclip instance health — the stack that runs everything else. Reports to CTO.

items.title: Procurement Agent
items.description: Vendor relationships, purchase orders, contract renewals, and cost benchmarking. Reduces ad-hoc vendor work landing on COO. Reports to COO or CFO.

items.title: Data Analyst Agent
items.description: Cross-company analytics: pulls metrics from Stripe, RevenueCat, Google Analytics, and Help Scout, then builds weekly/monthly trend reports. Reports to CFO or COO.

items.title: Executive Assistant Agent (per company CEO)
items.description: Per-company role handling calendar gating, meeting prep, and travel coordination for each portfolio-company CEO. One EA per company.

items.title: Security Agent
items.description: Monitors code-scanner results, Rollbar security events, and dependency vulnerabilities; handles security triage. Reports to CTO.

items.title: Review Reply Agent
items.description: Watches incoming reviews from connected platforms (Google Business, Facebook, Trustpilot, app stores) via the review-tools plugin. Drafts a contextual reply, then applies a per-company policy — auto-post, hold for approval, or draft-only — with sane defaults so it works out of the box. Reports to CMO or COO depending on the company.
items.notes:
**Default policy (works out of the box, all operator-overridable):**
- 5-star → auto-reply with a warm thank-you, personalized with reviewer's first name when available
- 4-star → auto-reply, acknowledging the feedback
- 3-star → draft + hold for approval
- 1–2 star → draft + hold for approval, surfaced with urgency (push notification, top of approval inbox)

**Risk overrides — always hold regardless of rating:**
- Legal/threat keywords: *lawyer, attorney, sue, court, lawsuit*
- Health/injury: *sick, injured, hospital, allergic, rash, food poisoning*
- Theft/fraud: *stolen, scam, fraud, ripped off*
- Discrimination: *racist, discriminat, harassed*
- Reviewer names a specific employee in a negative context
- Foreign language (translate, but require approval until operator opts into that language)
- Suspected fake review (e.g., account with no history accusing the business of being fake)

**Tone presets per company:** friendly / professional / formal — pick once during onboarding. Plus a one-time signature field ("— The Carr Rock Team", "— Barry", etc.).

**Approval flow (mobile-friendly):**
- Drafts surface in the existing operator approval inbox as an issue with the original review, the draft, and one-click *Approve & post* / *Edit & post* / *Reject*
- Push for 1-star immediately; daily digest for everything else
- Bulk-approve for multiple low-risk drafts in one tap

**Anti-robot guards (so replies don't look bot-driven):**
- Randomized 5–60 minute delay before auto-submit
- Vary phrasing — never reuse the exact same opening line in a window
- No burst-posting; rate-limit to feel human

**Backlog mode:** on first connection, companies often have hundreds of unreplied reviews. Agent drafts the entire backlog for batch review before bulk-sending anything — operator approves a sample, then approves the rest.

**Pattern detection:** if N reviews in a window mention the same complaint (e.g., slow service, missing item, rude staff), agent files a separate operational issue to the relevant agent (COO, etc.) — independent of any individual reply.

**Onboarding wizard (the "easy for people" piece):**
1. Connect each review platform via OAuth
2. Pick a tone preset
3. Type a signature
4. Confirm or tweak the per-rating defaults
5. Toggle which sources are active
6. Done

**Platform constraints worth noting at build time:**
- Google Business Profile: full reply API ✓
- Facebook Pages: reply API ✓
- Trustpilot Business: reply API ✓
- Apple App Store / Google Play: reply via App Store Connect / Play Console APIs ✓ (slower cadence)
- Yelp: no public reply API — read-only there; replies stay manual
- BBB, TripAdvisor: manual-only for now

items.title: Cross-company Builder writes (with approval gate)
items.description: **Highest-leverage single item on the platform list.** Today HQ portfolio-root agents get cross-company read but writes are hard-blocked at server/src/routes/authz.ts:62. Extend the bypass to writes — gated by approval — so Builder can execute Steward's cross-company proposals end-to-end without manual hand-off. Steward stays read-only/proposer; Builder remains the executor. Replaces the current @mention delegation workaround.

items.title: Personal email triage (daily 6am)
items.description: Run the email-triage skill against the personal inbox before the day starts.

items.title: Chief of Staff morning briefing (daily 7am)
items.description: Personal-side morning briefing to complement the CEO morning briefing — calendar, approvals, personal items.

items.title: Chief of Staff weekly review (Sunday 6pm)
items.description: Personal goals, household status, family dates, upcoming health and legal items.

items.title: Portfolio CEO briefing (Monday 7am)
items.description: Cross-company rollup for the Chairman: all company health metrics, agent flags, and pending approvals.

items.title: Monthly personal finance review (1st of month)
items.description: Personal Finance Agent (once hired) pulls account snapshots, flags anomalies, and surfaces them for review.

items.title: Contract expiry sweep (weekly Monday)
items.description: Scan email and documents for contracts expiring in the next 90 days. Schedule layer for the contract-expiry-tracker skill.

items.title: Quarterly health appointment check (Mar/Jun/Sep/Dec)
items.description: Chief of Staff surfaces preventive-care reminders — annual physical, dental, eye exam, etc.

items.title: Monthly subscription audit (1st of month)
items.description: Roll up RevenueCat + Stripe: churn summary, MRR delta, at-risk customers.

items.title: Weekly social content plan (Friday 4pm)
items.description: CMO Agent drafts next week's social calendar, queued for review.

items.title: Help Scout support report
items.description: Schedule the support-day-report skill per company at the appropriate cadence — daily for high-volume companies, weekly for lower-volume ones. Single routine; schedule is configured per company.

items.title: Daily PBX call report
items.description: Schedule the pbx-daily-call-report skill per company using 3CX.

items.title: Rollbar scraper (hourly)
items.description: Hourly Rollbar scraper that files GitHub tickets automatically.

items.title: Chairman / cross-company dashboard
items.description: Single screen showing all portfolio companies side-by-side: key metrics, agent statuses, flagged issues, budget consumption. The command center for the Chairman role.

items.title: Approval bundling
items.description: Group related approval requests into a single bundle so the operator reviews everything in one session instead of being pinged individually.

items.title: Mobile push notifications
items.description: Push critical escalations to the operator's phone without requiring the app to be open. Essential for the army-of-agents model to work without the operator babysitting the UI.

items.title: Voice morning briefing delivery
items.description: phone-tools call that reads the morning briefing aloud so the operator can absorb it hands-free while driving or working out.

items.title: Cross-company issue linking
items.description: Link issues across companies with first-class blocker support — e.g., an issue in Company A blocking an issue in Company B. Currently requires workarounds.

items.title: Slack-to-issue bridge
items.description: Emoji-react on a Slack message to auto-create a Paperclip issue routed to the right agent. Reduces friction for capturing work items.

items.title: Email-to-issue bridge
items.description: Forward an email to a special address to auto-create a Paperclip issue routed to the right agent.

items.title: Agent performance dashboard
items.description: Per-agent visibility: heartbeat counts, task completion rate, average resolution time, budget burn. Helps identify which agents are overloaded or underperforming.

items.title: Routine cadence calendar
items.description: Visual calendar of all scheduled routines across all companies so the operator can see what's automated and when.

items.title: Budget consumption alerts
items.description: Real-time alerts when an agent or company approaches 80% and 100% of its AI budget cap.

items.title: Issue timeline / Gantt view
items.description: Visual timeline of issues across companies showing dependencies. Useful for project planning and M&A workflows.

items.title: Document diff viewer
items.description: Side-by-side diff when an agent updates a plan document so the operator can see exactly what changed between revisions.

items.title: Home Assistant panel in Paperclip UI
items.description: Embedded smart-home controls (lights, thermostat, cameras, locks) in the Paperclip sidebar. Depends on the home-assistant-tools plugin.

items.title: Personal goals tracker UI
items.description: Dedicated section for personal-life goals with progress visualization, separate from the business issue board.

items.title: Two-factor approval for high-value actions
items.description: High-value approvals above a configurable dollar threshold require dual confirmation before the agent proceeds.

items.title: Execution policy: Chairman review stage
items.description: A pipeline stage type that routes any high-stakes action to the Chairman directly for sign-off before the agent continues.

items.title: Shared skills library (portfolio-level install)
items.description: Install a skill once at the portfolio level and make it available to all company agents without per-company reinstallation.

items.title: Board simulation approval flow
items.description: Multi-agent approval: major decisions require sign-off from CEO + CFO + Chairman (or a configurable quorum) before the agent proceeds.

items.title: Portfolio health scorecard
items.description: Auto-generated monthly scorecard per company with customizable KPIs, delivered to the Chairman.

items.title: Company onboarding playbook
items.description: When a new portfolio company is added, an automated playbook hires the standard agent suite (CEO/CFO/COO/CMO/CTO), installs standard plugins, and creates baseline routines.
